name: Node Candidate MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for managing job candidates and recruiting workflows. Enables AI agents to track candidate applications, store candidate profiles, manage hiring pipeline stages, and interact with recruiting data — supporting AI-assisted hiring and talent acquisition workflows.
use_cases: Tracking job candidate applications and pipeline stages from recruiting agents
Querying candidate profiles and history from HR automation agents
Managing interview scheduling and candidate status from talent acquisition workflows
Integrating candidate data into AI-driven hiring decision support systems
not_for: Teams using dedicated ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday) — use native integrations
Production HR systems without proper data privacy controls
Teams not in technical recruiting workflows
best_when: A small technical team or recruiter wants AI agents to manage a lightweight candidate tracking system — automating candidate pipeline management without a full ATS.
avoid_when: You use enterprise ATS platforms. This is a lightweight community tool, not an enterprise HR solution. Candidate data is sensitive — ensure proper access controls.

auth.notes: Local operation — no external authentication. Candidate data stored locally. Implement access controls at deployment level.

pricing.notes: Free open source community MCP server.

known_agent_gotchas: Candidate data is privacy-sensitive — implement access controls before exposing to agents
Community tool with 81 stars — adequate for lightweight use but not enterprise-scale
No built-in ATS integrations — operates as standalone candidate data store
Not a replacement for dedicated ATS platforms like Greenhouse or Lever
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local candidate data. Privacy-sensitive PII — candidate names, contacts, history. Implement access controls. No external auth — secure at deployment level.

security_score_components.security_notes: Privacy-sensitive PII. Local storage. No built-in access controls — implement at deployment. Community tool.
